title: lithospermum decumbens
intro: Lithospermum decumbens is a perennial plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae), also known as gromwell, which is native to Europe and western Asia. The medicinal properties of Lithospermum decumbens are attributed to its ability to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. This plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Lithospermum decumbens can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
